title: actinidia rufa var. cordifolia
intro: Actinidia rufa var. cordifolia, also known as the Chinese gold-thread vine or goldenseal vine, is a perennial woody vine that belongs to the Actinidiaceae family of plants. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been known to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Actinidia rufa var. cordifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
